name: Bank of Hawaii Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 4.375% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Bank of Hawaii Corporation issues depositary shares representing ownership of preferred stock. The preferred stock pays a fixed dividend rate and ranks senior to the company's common stock in terms of dividend payments and liquidation rights. Bank of Hawaii is headquartered in Honolulu, Hawaii.
